CREATE TABLE hugeint_test (id HUGEINT, value HUGEINT);
SELECT id FROM hugeint_test WHERE value = 170141183460469231731687303715884105727;
SELECT id FROM hugeint_test WHERE value < 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hugeint_test WHERE value = -170141183460469231731687303715884105728;
CREATE TABLE another_table (huge_id HUGEINT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table (huge_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Test value 1');
INSERT INTO another_table (huge_id, description) VALUES (170141183460469231731687303715884105727, 'Max HUGEINT');
SELECT a.huge_id, a.description FROM another_table a JOIN hugeint_test b ON a.huge_id = b.value WHERE a.huge_id > 0;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM hugeint_test) AS max_value, (SELECT MIN(value) FROM hugeint_test) AS min_value;
SELECT id, value + 1 AS incremented_value FROM hugeint_test WHERE value + 1 <= 170141183460469231731687303715884105727;
SELECT value, CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN 'Positive' WHEN value < 0 THEN 'Negative' ELSE 'Zero' END AS value_category FROM hugeint_test;
UPDATE hugeint_test SET value = -value WHERE id = 1;
